sensitivity_notes: Case-variant duplicates test whether the prompt instructs case-insensitive matching
Impossible dates (2023-02-29, 2023-02-30) test date validation depth
Status case variations ('active' vs 'Active') test format consistency detection
String-formatted amounts with commas test non-numeric purchase amount detection
Multi-error rows test whether the model can identify several co-occurring issues
